calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause For Change Of Gender
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Petitioner Yibrael Ben Avraham present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of GENDER from FEMALE to MALE.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner, Sanjosh Tyree Lal present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Yisrael Ben Avraham.
Decree signed in open court.
No Gender change made.
